user.title: PIP HA Random Workouts Setup
user.description:
Enter your workout categories and URLs. Format: Name|URL (one per line). Example:
Yoga|https://site.com/yoga.json
Cardio|https://site.com/cardio.json

pick_random.name: Pick Random Workout
pick_random.description: Selects a random workout for a specific category.

category.name: Category Name
category.description: The name of the category (e.g., Yoga) exactly as entered during setup.

entity_id.name: Media Player
entity_id.description: Optional: The TV to play the video on.
